specialists.name: NJ
specialists.title: Founder & master injector
specialists.description: With over 15 years in medical aesthetics, NJ specializes in restorative facial sculpting that honors each individual's unique bone structure.
specialists.imageAlt: Portrait of NJ, founder and master injector

specialists.name: Sarah
specialists.title: Lash specialist
specialists.description: Sarah blends precision with relaxation, crafting bespoke lash sets that range from barely-there enhancement to red-carpet drama.

specialists.name: Elena
specialists.title: PMU artist
specialists.description: Elena's "soft touch" philosophy for permanent makeup ensures results that look effortless and timeless, focusing on subtle brow architecture.
specialists.imageAlt: Elena, PMU artist, during a treatment consultation

specialists.name: Maya
specialists.title: Licensed esthetician
specialists.description: Maya focuses on corrective facials and barrier health, pairing clinical-grade protocols with a calming, educational experience.
